title: Spawn/fiber runtime, channels, and split System I/O

source.subject: feat: spawn/fiber runtime, channels, and split System I/O surfaces

body:
## Outcome

Spawn/fiber runtime, channels, and split System I/O surfaces.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Concurrency surfaces align platform-spec execution chapters with compiler runtime modules.

## Platform specification

- Implements [Fibers](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/execution/concurrency/fibers) (`/platform-spec/execution/concurrency/fibers`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`12ee673`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/12ee673) — feat: spawn/fiber runtime, channels, and split System I/O surfaces
